name: SEO-AUD-V1
description: Modular SEO auditor for website technical, on-page, performance, structured data, content, and indexing checks with JSON-first outputs.

urls_file.description: Path to file containing one URL per line.

keyword.description: Target keyword for URL keyword relevance checks.

outputs.console: Each module prints structured JSON stage output.
outputs.json_report: Per-URL JSON file in output directory.
outputs.doc_report: DOCX report if --doc flag is provided.
